start_group: Oh. You found me. How unfortunate — for you.
start_pm:
A private conversation. How intimate.

Type /help to see what I can and cannot be bothered to do.
start_lang_prompt: First things first. Choose a language for this chat:
help_short: I answer when I feel like it — roughly 1 in N messages in groups. For the full manual, send /help in a private chat.
help_full: 📖 Manual — for those who apparently need one 🗣 Public commands: /start — Wake me up. I was not sleeping, I was simply not acknowledging you. The distinction matters. /help — This document. More detailed in DMs, shorter in groups, equally unwelcome either way. /about — Current personality configuration for this chat. /reset — Erase your conversation history with me. Nothing of value will be lost. /dont_touch_me — Group-only. Add yourself to untouchables so I ignore you (except /explain). /explain 🔬 — Reply to any message for a factual breakdown with no toxicity. In groups, this command has a per-user cooldown set by admins. 🔧 Admin commands (group admins only): /settings — Open the settings menu. Try not to make things worse. /toxic ☠️ — Reply to any message to force my full attention onto it. Use with intent. 🧠 How I decide whether to answer: • In groups I respond to roughly 1 in N messages — N is configured by admins. • Direct replies to my messages always get a response, once per cooldown period per person. • Messages below the minimum word count are beneath my notice. • 🎤 Voice messages and 📷 photos are processed — I hear and see everything. • Reply chains are read for context. I know what you were actually talking about. ☠️ Toxicity levels: 1 🧊 — Cold Disappointment · I note your error the way one notes a slightly unpleasant smell. Calmly. 2 🔬 — Logical Dissection · Your reasoning, examined, dissected, and found wanting. Citations included. 3 🩺 — Psychological Pressure · I read between your lines and press precisely on what I find there. Default. 4 🗡 — Weaponised Wit · The gap between your self-image and your actual performance, made clearly visible. 5 ☢️ — Nuclear Wednesday · A complete forensic audit. Nothing survives. Not a verdict — a fact.
about: This is {chat_title}. Toxicity level: {level}/5 ({level_name}) Language: {chat_lang} Reply frequency: 1 in {freq_min}–{freq_max} messages Cooldown: {cooldown}s per user
reset_done: Your history is gone. Nothing of value was lost.
reset_no_history: There was nothing to delete. Typical.
lang_choose: Choose the language for this chat:
lang_invalid: Unknown language. Try en, ru, or ua.
admin_only: Admin access required. Which you do not have.
group_only: This command is for group chats.
error_generic: Something broke. Probably your fault, indirectly.
cooldown_active: I already answered you recently. Wait.
menu_title: Bot Settings Adjust my behaviour. Try not to make things worse.
pm_menu_title: Private Settings These settings apply to our private chat.
pm_global_untouchable_enabled: I will now ignore you in all chats (except /explain).
pm_reset_confirm_text: Remove you from the database? This will delete your history, profiles, and untouchable flags.
pm_reset_done: You have been removed from the database.
freq_title: Reply frequency I respond to 1 in every N messages, where N is random in the range below. Current: {min}–{max}
freq_invalid: Min must be less than or equal to Max.
cooldown_title: User cooldown Minimum seconds between my replies to the same user. Current: {val}s Select:
explain_cooldown_title: /explain cooldown Minimum interval between /explain requests from the same user (group only). Current: {val} min
chain_title: Reply chain depth How many messages back I read in a reply chain for context. Current: {val} Select:
min_words_title: Minimum words Messages shorter than this are ignored entirely. Current: {val} Select:
user_mgmt_list_empty: No user data in this chat yet.
untouchables_title: Untouchables Users in this list are ignored by the bot (except /explain).
untouchables_list_empty: No untouchable users in this chat yet.
reset_chat_prompt: Delete ALL history and profiles in this chat?
reset_chat_confirm: All chat history and profiles cleared.
toxic_no_reply: Reply to someone's message with /toxic to target them.
toxic_no_text: That message has no text to work with.
untouchable_blocked_toxic: This user is untouchable in this chat.
dont_touch_me_added: Added. I will ignore you in this chat (except /explain).
dont_touch_me_already: You are already untouchable in this chat.
explain_reply_required: Reply to a message or type /explain some text
pm_explain_hour_limit: In PM, /explain is limited to 5 requests per hour.
pm_text_hour_limit: In PM, text messages are limited to 10 per hour.
pm_media_hour_limit: In PM, media (photo/voice/audio) is limited to 5 per hour.
explain_help: /explain analyzes anything without regard for self-esteem. How to use: • /explain text — get analysis • Reply to message with /explain — it will analyze it • Works with text, images, and voice messages
